title: ageratina cutervensis
intro: Ageratina cutervensis, also known as Hierba de San Miguel, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Andean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Ageratina cutervensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, Ageratina cutervensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
